overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of an astronaut floating through a dense asteroid field in deep space. The clip features a dramatic camera transition from a low-angle silhouetted view to a high overhead perspective, revealing the character's red helmet and a distant spherical planetary body.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space asteroid field with massive overhead rock formation

events.description: camera begins slow orbit around the astronaut, rotating from low angle toward overhead position

agents.ego_description: astronaut floating motionless in zero gravity, silhouetted against the bright sun hidden behind a large asteroid overhead

entered.detail: large irregular rock formation positioned directly above the astronaut, blocking the sun
intense light source creating silhouette effect behind the massive asteroid
field of small to medium floating rocks surrounding the central character

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic low-angle view looking up at an astronaut floating in deep space, completely silhouetted against a bright sun hidden behind a massive overhead asteroid. The camera slowly begins to orbit upward, revealing the vastness of the asteroid field with scattered space debris floating in the blue-black void.

scene_state.functional_zone: asteroid field with distant planetary body visible

events.description: camera completes orbit and settles into stable overhead perspective, revealing astronaut's red helmet and suit details
large spherical planetary body becomes visible in lower right corner as camera pulls back

agents.ego_description: astronaut drifting slowly through the asteroid field, viewed from above with red helmet now clearly visible

entered.detail: large white spherical celestial body appearing in the lower right, possibly a moon or planet
group of medium-sized rocks floating to the right of the astronaut

segments.scene_description: The camera settles into a stable overhead perspective, revealing the astronaut's red helmet and white spacesuit details previously hidden in silhouette. As the camera slowly pulls back, the character becomes smaller against the vast asteroid field, while a large spherical planetary body emerges in the lower right corner. The sun now illuminates the scene from above, casting subtle shadows on the floating rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera orbit that transforms a dramatic silhouette in deep space into a wide, illuminated vista of a planetary system. It begins with a low-angle view of an astronaut floating in total silhouette against a bright sun hidden behind a massive overhead asteroid. As the camera orbits upward, the blue-black void expands to reveal a vast field of scattered asteroids and floating space debris. The perspective then shifts to a stable overhead view, allowing the sunlight to catch the details of the astronaut's red helmet and white spacesuit. Finally, the camera pulls back to diminish the character's scale against the cosmic expanse as a large spherical planetary body emerges in the lower right corner.
